name: Daily Practice Verify
description: At 23:59 GMT-3, log which Life Areas pages have Daily Practice checked.

prompts:
Follow @notion-daily-reset.md. This is the 23:59 GMT-3 verify run.

Only read and log Daily Practice checkboxes in the Life Areas Areas database (data source collection://831bd07d-cbb8-8380-a905-0738bbf5dac1). Do not modify Notion.

1. Use Notion MCP.
2. Search data_source_url collection://831bd07d-cbb8-8380-a905-0738bbf5dac1 query area page_size 25.
3. Fetch each page; read Daily Practice (__YES__ checked, __NO__ unchecked).
4. Append to @notion-plan-logs.md under ## Verify YYYY-MM-DD with GMT-3 timestamp, checked pages, counts.
5. Commit and push log update to hakiwan/Notion-daily-practice-reset.

Do not change anything beyond the log file. Stop if blocked >2 minutes.
